00008 #ifndef TCB_H_
00009 #define TCB_H_
00010 
00011 /* Simple thread control block */
00012 struct PCS{
00013 
00014         pid_t thread_id;        /* thread id */
00015         pid_t parent_id;        /* parent thread id */
00016         int status;                     /* thread status */
00017         int exit_code;          /* thread exit code */
00018 
00019 }
00020 
00021 #endif /* TCB_H_ */
